1.description: lookup kommunenummer and bounding box for Lillestrøm municipality

2.description: fetch parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: fetch quick-clay hazard polygons (utlosningomr) intersecting the municipality bbox

4.description: fetch 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality bbox

5.description: find parcels that intersect quick-clay polygons (parcels-in-hazard)

7.description: count distinct parcels per grid cell

8.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending, tie-breaker by grid id asc

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT skredomrid, skredomrnavn, skredfaregradklasse, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS envelope_wkt
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, gid, ST_AsText(geom) AS geom_wkt
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Lillestrøm' LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '3205';

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, lokalid, ssbid1000m, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(273111.449998925,6629675.919999996,301398.5999995858,6665930.429999998,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
